items.title: It’s a love story – or is it? The surprising conflict and chaos in Taylor Swift’s songs about commitment

items.title: The supreme court has again undermined the power of Congress | Moira Donegan

items.title: Oura Ring 5 review: a stunning generational leap for smart rings
items.summary: Slimmer, longer lasting and much easier to live with, new Oura sets a very high new bar for health-tracking wearablesOura’s new Ring 5 is a massive upgrade for smart rings, dramatically shrinking in size and weight to bring them right into line with standard wedding bands and other jewellery.
